debug_info.goal:
S : Finset ℕ
h₀ : S.card = 10
h₁ : S ⊆ Finset.Ico 10 100
⊢ ∃ S₁ S₂, S₁.Nonempty ∧ S₁ ⊆ S ∧ S₂.Nonempty ∧ S₂ ⊆ S ∧ Disjoint S₁ S₂ ∧ ∑ x ∈ S₁, x = ∑ x ∈ S₂, x

failed_attempts:
let P := S.powerset
  have hP : P.card = 1024 := by rw [Finset.card_powerset, h₀]; norm_num
  let f (s : Finset ℕ) := ∑ x ∈ s, x
  have h_im : ∀ s ∈ P, f s ∈ Finset.range 1000 := by
    intro s hs
    rw [Finset.mem_range]
    calc ∑ x ∈ s, x
      _ ≤ s.card * 99 := Finset.sum_le_card_nsmul s _ 99 (fun x hx ↦ Nat.le_pred_of_lt (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (Finset.mem_powerset.mp hs hx))).2)
      _ ≤ 10 * 99 := Nat.mul_le_mul_right 99 (h₀ ▸ Finset.card_le_card (Finset.mem_powerset.mp hs))
      _ < 1000 := by norm_num
  have h_card : (Finset.range 1000).card < P.card := by rw [Finset.card_range, hP]; norm_num
  obtain ⟨A, hA, B, hB, hne, hsum⟩ := Finset.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt_of_maps_to h_card h_im
  have h_sum_decomp : ∀ (X Y : Finset ℕ), ∑ x ∈ X, x = ∑ x ∈ X \ Y, x + ∑ x ∈ X ∩ Y, x := by
    intro X Y; rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter X Y), Finset.sdiff_union_inter]
  rw [h_sum_decomp A B, h_sum_decomp B A, Finset.inter_comm A B] at hsum
  have h_eq : ∑ x ∈ A \ B, x = ∑ x ∈ B \ A, x := Nat.add_right_cancel hsum
  refine ⟨A \ B, B \ A, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, h_eq⟩
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]; intro h_empty
    rw [h_empty, Finset.sum_empty] at h_eq
    have : B \ A = ∅ := Finset.eq_empty_of_forall_not_mem (fun x hx ↦ ne_of_gt (lt_of_le_of_lt (by norm_num) (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (Finset.mem_powerset.mp hB (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1))).1) (Finset.sum_eq_zero_iff.mp h_eq.symm x hx))
    exact hne (Finset.Subset.antisymm (Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp h_empty) (Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp this))
  · exact (Finset.sdiff_subset A B).trans (Finset.mem_powerset.mp hA)
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]; intro h_empty
    rw [h_empty, Finset.sum_empty] at h_eq
    have : A \ B = ∅ := Finset.eq_empty_of_forall_not_mem (fun x hx ↦ ne_of_gt (lt_of_le_of_lt (by norm_num) (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (Finset.mem_powerset.mp hA (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1))).1) (Finset.sum_eq_zero_iff.mp h_eq x hx))
    exact hne (Finset.Subset.antisymm (Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp this) (Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp h_empty))
  · exact (Finset.sdiff_subset B A).trans (Finset.mem_powerset.mp hB)
  · exact Finset.disjoint_left.mpr fun _ h₁ h₂ => (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp h₂).2 (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp h₁).1
